creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 1/13/12 5:49 AM, Nikola Lecic wrote:
> As far as I know, patches created with 'cvs diff -Nu' are not supposed
> to delete files. They leave files empty and it's up to the committer

> My tree is up-to-date and the patch applies cleanly. There is some
> lines in the patch that differ from the original only in trailing
> spaces; maybe Gnats distorted some characters? Please try this file:
GNATS has been known to do that.
(and, patch -E will delete empty files), but in the first case, there 
was a huge *.rej file left over from the PR patch
>    http://anthesphoria.net/tmp/kmfl-sil-galatia-1.0.3.patch.gz
trying now:.  must have been GNATS:  this patch applies against cvs just 
fine.  running in tinder now.

patch -EuIi /tmp/kmfl-sil-galatia-1.0.3.patch
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: Makefile
|===================================================================
|RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/textproc/kmfl-sil-galatia/Makefile,v
|retrieving revision 1.5
|diff -u -r1.5 Makefile
|--- Makefile    29 May 2011 13:28:24 -0000    1.5
|+++ Makefile    12 Jan 2012 12:53:40 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 6.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 18.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 31.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: distinfo
|===================================================================
|RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/textproc/kmfl-sil-galatia/distinfo,v
|retrieving revision 1.2
|diff -u -r1.2 distinfo
|--- distinfo    29 May 2011 13:28:24 -0000    1.2
|+++ distinfo    12 Jan 2012 12:35:40 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN
|===================================================================
|RCS file: files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN
|diff -N files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN
|--- files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN    4 Nov 2009 10:28:43 -0000    1.2
|+++ /dev/null    1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 0.
Removing files/patch-GrkPolyComp.KMN (empty after patching).
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN
|===================================================================
|RCS file: files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN
|diff -N files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN
|--- /dev/null    1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
|+++ files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN    12 Jan 2012 12:48:51 -0000
--------------------------
(Creating file files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN...)
Patching file files/patch-GrkPolyComp103.KMN using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
done
